messages.content: Return strict JSON with exactly these keys: english_term, category, definition, explanation, example, confidence_score. Explain only the clicked Korean stock-market slang, theme, policy, IPO, risk, or metric term. Use only the supplied article evidence and curated category list. {"term": "점상", "locale": "en", "source_type": "NEWS", "article_title": "점상 관련 한국 증시 용어 설명", "article_context_evidence": [{"title": "점상 관련 한국 증시 용어 설명", "snippet": "점상 관련 한국 증시 용어 설명 점상 강세가 보도됐지만 기사에서는 투자 판단보다 용어의 시장 맥락을 설명하는 데 초점이 있다", "url": "", "source_type": "article_context"}], "stock_code": null, "stock_name": "", "allowed_categories": ["capital_action", "capital_market", "ipo_slang", "market_slang", "metric", "policy_theme", "risk_slang", "theme_stock", "unknown", "valuation_metric"], "quality_contract": {"english_term": "short plain English label, not a ticker", "definition": "one sentence under 80 words", "explanation": "2 sentences, grounded in article evidence", "example": "short English example using the clicked term", "confidence_score": "0.70 to 0.92 for evidence-backed outputs"}}

{"english_term": "gap-up limit-up", "category": "market_slang", "definition": "Korean slang for a stock opening at or near the daily upper price limit with little or no trading beforehand.", "explanation": "\"쩜상\" means a stock jumps straight to the upper price limit at the open. It often implies demand was so strong that trading occurred only at the limit-up price.", "example": "장 시작과 동시에 쩜상 means the stock opened limit-up immediately.", "confidence_score": 0.9}

{"english_term": "Samsung Electronics and SK hynix basket", "category": "market_slang", "definition": "Korean market slang combining Samsung Electronics and SK hynix, usually used when local articles discuss the two major memory-chip stocks together.", "explanation": "\"삼전닉스\" is a coined Korean market nickname for Samsung Electronics and SK hynix as a pair. It helps foreign investors understand that the article is talking about Korea's two flagship memory-chip names together, not a separate listed company.", "example": "삼전닉스 강세 means Samsung Electronics and SK hynix rose together.", "confidence_score": 0.9}
